data.title: Major Change in International Data Transfers: GDPR Certification Goes Global with Europrivacy
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Luxembourg, the European Data Protection Board (EDPB) made significant strides towards simplifying international data transfers and bolstering personal data security. Two key decisions were reached: the approval of extending Europrivacy, the prestigious European Data Protection Seal of Approval, and...

data.title: New Combination Therapy for Advanced Small Cell, Lung Cancer Approved in Australia and Singapore
data.description: Australia and Singapore have granted approval for the use of ZEPZELCA® (lurbinectedin) with atezolizumab (Tecentriq®) as a first-line maintenance treatment for adult patients with extensive-stage small cell lung cancer (ES-SCLC). This approval comes after successful trials and is considered a significant development in the treatment of this aggressive form of lung cancer. ZEPZELCA® in combination with atezolizumab is expected to provide a new treatment option for patients with ES-SCLC in these countries.

data.title: Share repurchase programme: Transactions of week 16 2026
data.description: Starting from February 5, 2026, until January 29, 2027, Jyske Bank will be implementing a share repurchase program. The bank plans to acquire shares amounting to a maximum of DKK 3 billion during this timeframe according to Corporate Announcement No. 11/2026 dated February 5, 2026. The share buyback scheme adheres to the guidelines set by the Market Abuse Regulation (EU Regulation No. 596/2014) and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of March 8, 2016, which collectively form the "Safe Harbour Rules."

data.title: UnitedHealth Likely To Report Lower Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE: UNH) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 21. Analysts are predicting a decrease in quarterly earnings to $6.61 per share, compared to $7.20 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be around $109.66 billion, slightly higher than the previous year's $109.58 billion. The company recently filed a shelf prospectus for a securities offering on March 2. In Friday's trading session, UnitedHealth shares closed at $324.63, marking a 2.6% increase. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, readers can check the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga. The full story can be found on their website.

data.title: Nxera Pharma to Receive US$10 Million Milestone Payment from AbbVie under Collaboration Targeting Neurological Diseases
data.description: In Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge and London, UK, on 20 April 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. disclosed a significant update. The company, listed as TSE 4565, has successfully achieved a third R&D milestone in its collaborative efforts with AbbVie. This partnership, which concentrates on neurological diseases, has garnered Nxera a substantial payment of US$10 million.

data.title: Nanobiotix reveals Pre-Treatment with Nanoprimer improves bioavailability & reduces toxicity in LNP-Delivered DNA immunotherapy.
data.description: A recent report reveals that there has been a significant increase in cyber attacks targeting businesses worldwide. The data shows that cyber attacks have surged by more than 60% in the past year, with over 250,000 businesses falling victim to these attacks. These attacks have resulted in financial losses exceeding $200 billion globally. It is evident that businesses are facing a growing threat from cyber criminals, highlighting the importance of implementing robust cybersecurity measures to protect sensitive data and prevent such attacks in the future.

data.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops, expected to increase in next adjustment despite challenges like reduced rewards and higher energy costs.
data.description: Bitcoin miners have been encountering difficulties in the last 12 months due to a variety of factors, including lower block rewards, increasing energy costs, a downturn in the cryptocurrency market, and geopolitical uncertainties.

data.title: Fermi Inc. Announces "Fermi 2.0" Strategic Evolution, New Board Chairman, Leadership Transitions, and New Office Locations
data.description: Transitioning from a start-up to a scaled enterprise, the next phase of evolution is marked by the appointment of Marius Haas as the new Chairman of the Board. Additionally, Jeffrey S. Stein has been named as a Board Director. The company reaffirms its dedication to the ongoing development of Project Matador, strengthening the partnership with Texas Tech, and catering to America's energy requirements. The announcement was made in Dallas on April 20.

data.title: Tencent Invests in Kaspi.kz Alongside Co-Founder & CEO Mikheil Lomtadze and Long-Term U.S. Institutional Investors
data.description: In Almaty, Kazakhstan, on April 20, 2026, Kaspi.kz (Nasdaq: KSPI) revealed that a transaction involving the acquisition of 6.0 million American Depositary Shares (ADSs) from Baring Fintech Venture Funds has been finalized. The purchase was carried out by Tencent, along with Kaspi.kz Co-Founder and CEO Mikheil Lomtadze, key members of the senior management team, and long-term institutional investors.

data.title: Coinbase tests AI agents on Slack & email, CEO forecasts they will surpass human transactions & outnumber staff soon.
data.description: Brian Armstrong has forecasted that artificial intelligence agents will exceed humans in conducting onchain transactions and will soon surpass the number of employees at his company.

data.title: Vercel, a cloud hosting firm, admits 'limited' data breach after hacker offers to sell user info for $2M.
data.description: It has been revealed that Vercel fell victim to a security breach when a hacker put the company's data up for sale on a forum for $2 million.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum diverge in tackling security risks, highlighting their contrasting approaches on blockchain safety.
data.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum are each approaching future cryptographic risks and long-term blockchain security in distinctive ways. While Bitcoin has a market capitalization of over $700 billion and aims to prioritize decentralization and security through its widely recognized proof-of-work consensus mechanism, Ethereum, with a market cap exceeding $300 billion, is transitioning towards a proof-of-stake model to enhance scalability and energy efficiency. These contrasting strategies reflect the unique priorities and objectives of these two leading cryptocurrencies in safeguarding their networks and advancing their technological capabilities.

data.title: Execs from Charles Schwab and Citadel Securities considering entering prediction markets, avoiding sports bets.
data.description: Executives from Charles Schwab and Citadel Securities have expressed potential interest in entering the prediction market industry. They are specifically interested in non-sports-related markets.
